name: 00_full_platform_white
note: complete platform, reference only, not the modular building unit

name: 01_endpoint_left_white
note: left endpoint block with rounded cap and open right edge

name: 02_endpoint_right_white
note: right endpoint block with open left edge

name: 03_endpoint_left_mirrored_for_right_white
note: mirrored left endpoint, useful as a single reusable endpoint asset

name: 04_middle_link_block_white
note: repeatable middle connector block; use this for variable-length procedural assembly

name: 05_middle_single_panel_white
note: smaller single green panel motif, useful as a detail/tile reference
